testcase.name: test_create_product
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_moego_phase4_pos_crm.py:55: in test_create_product assert response.status_code == 200, f"Create product failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Create product failed: {"detail":"Invalid authentication credentials"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
